CONTENT.Honours: IndividualUEFA European Under-19 Championship Team of the Tournament: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: Brayann Pereira made his professional debut for RC Lens on 22 January 2022, replacing Gaël Kakuta in the 83rd minute of a 2–0 home Ligue 1 loss against Olympique de Marseille, as his side was already two scores down at the Stade Bollaert-Delelis.On 12 July 2022, Pereira signed a three-year contract with Auxerre. On 2 February 2023, Pereira was loaned to Bourg-Péronnas in Championnat National. On 4 August 2023, Pereira moved on a new loan to NEC Nijmegen in the Netherlands, with an option to buy.On 21 March 2024, NEC exercised their purchase option and signed a three-year contract with Pereira.
CONTENT.External links: Brayann Pereira at SoccerwayBrayann Pereira at the French Football Federation (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Pereira was born in France, and is of Angolan and Congolese descent. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Brayann Leancely Christva Pereira (born 21 May 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Dutch Eredivisie club NEC.
